A '''Shadowcloak''' was a traditional garment of the [[Umbaran/Legends|Umbaran]] people of the [[Ghost Nebula/Legends|Ghost Nebula]]. They were made up of numerous strands of a light [[Color/Legends|blue]] material. When seen in the [[Ultraviolet/Legends|ultraviolet]] [[Spectrum/Legends|spectrum]], it appeared to have numerous colors that had no name in most sentients' tongues. To species who could see into the ultraviolet, these cloaks appeared to be a riot of colors, including berl, crynor, nusp, and onsible. They were used for spying and assassinations, for they would be virtually undetectable to other Umbarans. [[Sly Moore/Legends|Sly Moore]] often wore a Shadowcloak, most likely for stylistic, symbolic and cultural reasons.

{{Clothes-stub}}
